description_long: This guard rail consists of a long, linear metal structure with regularly spaced vertical posts supporting horizontal rails. The design features a central section flanked by two symmetrical side sections, each with multiple vertical posts and horizontal panels. The rail appears to be constructed from steel or a similar metal, with a modular, industrial look typical of urban roadside or pedestrian barriers. The top and bottom rails are reinforced, and the vertical posts are evenly spaced, providing structural stability. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or tapering. The surface is smooth and metallic, with a uniform gray coloration and no visible reflective markings.
description: A long, modular steel guard rail with evenly spaced vertical posts and smooth, gray metallic panels, designed for urban roadside or pedestrian protection.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the guard rail, with all vertical posts and horizontal panels visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the narrow profile of the guard rail, emphasizing the thinness of the rails and posts.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same arrangement of posts and panels from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and vertical alignment of the posts.
